parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', action: 'list', contacts: $input.all().map(function(i) { return i.json; }), count: $input.all().length }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_relationships (name, title, organization, agency, email, phone, relationship_strength, last_contact_date, contact_frequency_days, notes, gda_unit) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, COALESCE(NULLIF($8, '')::DATE, CURRENT_DATE), $9, $10, $11) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING *

INSERT INTO gda_touchpoints (relationship_id, contact_type, summary, next_action, next_action_date) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, COALESCE(NULLIF($5, '')::DATE, NULL)) RETURNING *; UPDATE gda_relationships SET last_contact_date = CURRENT_DATE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1

SELECT r.*, CURRENT_DATE - r.last_contact_date AS days_since_contact, r.contact_frequency_days - (CURRENT_DATE - r.last_contact_date) AS days_until_due, CASE WHEN (CURRENT_DATE - r.last_contact_date) > r.contact_frequency_days THEN 'OVERDUE' WHEN (CURRENT_DATE - r.last_contact_date) > (r.contact_frequency_days * 0.75) THEN 'DUE_SOON' ELSE 'OK' END AS contact_status FROM gda_relationships r WHERE (CURRENT_DATE - r.last_contact_date) > (r.contact_frequency_days * 0.5) ORDER BY (CURRENT_DATE - r.last_contact_date) - r.contact_frequency_days DESC

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', action: 'gaps', gaps: $input.all().map(function(i) { return i.json; }), overdue_count: $input.all().filter(function(i) { return i.json.contact_status === 'OVERDUE'; }).length, due_soon_count: $input.all().filter(function(i) { return i.json.contact_status === 'DUE_SOON'; }).length }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid action. Use: list, upsert, touchpoint, gaps' }) }}
